scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/changes/highlight-worker.ts --outdir dist --splitting --minify && bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/app.css -o dist/app.css --minify
scripts.dev: bun build src/index.ts src/changes/highlight-worker.ts --outdir dist --splitting --watch & bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/app.css -o dist/app.css --watch
